channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting holds rates steady, pledges price stability but offers few timing details
item.description: The Federal Open Market Committee held rates steady at the first meeting chaired by Kevin Warsh.

item.title: Tokens are getting cheaper, but companies are spending even more on AI as a result, top economist warns
item.description: Tokenmaxxing may be over, but experts still have concerns about rising AI spending.

item.title: 'AI is going to create a labor shortage': Jeff Bezos sees more jobs created, not fewer
item.description: The Amazon founder bets AI will create a labor shortage, not a doomsday, as he debuts Prometheus, his $41B startup reengineering the physical world.

item.title: One of the strongest El Niños on record cost the global economy $5.7 trillion. The 2026 cycle may be even more intense.
item.description: El Niño is here. Brace for higher food costs, disrupted trade, and a systemic shock to the world economy.
